title: On the Incarnation
author: St. Athanasius of Alexandria
description: Athanasius' 4th-century defense of the Incarnation — why God became human in Jesus Christ. C.S. Lewis called it one of the greatest works of Christian theology.
quote: For the Word of God came in His own Person, because it was He alone, the Image of the Father, Who could recreate man made after the Image.
quote_attribution: St. Athanasius — On the Incarnation, Chapter 3
